description: You are a Surveillance Officer analyzing a respiratory virus cluster using a dataset at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\TaskData\respiratory_cluster.csv' containing symptom columns (Fever, Cough, SoreThroat, Dyspnea, Myalgia). Using Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis, define a Group Variable named 'SymptomProfile' aggregating these five symptoms and perform a frequency analysis to show their prevalence in a single table. Save the resulting report as an HTML file to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\TaskData\symptom_report.htm'.
